title: By the Grace of the Gods
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across S1 (12) + S2 (12). Manga ongoing (current ch. 71 as of mid-2026, art by Ranran, serialized on Manga UP! since 2017); AniList does not track a live chapter count for this series, so the figures here are sourced from publisher chapter listings. Season 1 corresponds to roughly the manga's first 40 chapters (the manga only caught up to the Season 1 anime content around ch. 40); Season 2's precise endpoint within the manga is less well documented online and is approximated here as the current published chapter.
